title: Mapping the Clinical Evidence on Remimazolam in Anaesthesia: A Protocol for a Scoping Review.
abstract: Remimazolam is a recently introduced benzodiazepine used for procedural sedation and general anaesthesia. Its pharmacokinetic profile, including rapid metabolism and predictable recovery, has generated interest in its potential advantages compared with traditional sedatives such as midazolam and propofol.
